description: Pins the shared label/region validation (behind confirm) and the create POST body. The confirm-gate message text itself diverges, so every case carries confirm:true.

cases.name: rejects label shorter than 3 characters
cases.expect_error: bucket label must be at least 3 characters

cases.name: rejects an invalid acl
cases.expect_error: acl must be one of: private, public-read, authenticated-read, public-read-write

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This operation creates a billable resource. Set confirm=true to proceed.
